ddls:
CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Full name of the artist */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of music the artist is associated with */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the artist */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the artist */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the artist */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* Social media handles of the artist */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the artist is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the artist's record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the artist's record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who created the album */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the album */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the album */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the album */,
  "label" TEXT /* Record label of the album */,
  "producer" TEXT /* Producer of the album */,
  "track_list" TEXT /* List of tracks in the album */,
  "cover_art" TEXT /* URL or path to the album cover art */,
  "explicit_content" INTEGER /* Indicates if the album contains explicit content */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the album's record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the album's record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "releases" (
  "release_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each release */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album being released */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the album */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the release (e.g., CD, digital, vinyl) */,
  "num_copies" INTEGER /* Number of copies released */,
  "catalog_number" TEXT /* Catalog number of the release */,
  "distribution_company" TEXT /* Distribution company for the release */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the release */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the release's record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the release's record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("release_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_releases_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing the rating */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review provided by the user */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was given */,
  "upvotes" INTEGER /* Number of upvotes for the review */,
  "downvotes" INTEGER /* Number of downvotes for the review */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the rating's record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the rating's record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, artist, listener) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL or path to the user's profile picture */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user's record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user's record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent genre (for hierarchical genres) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the genre's record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the genre's record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genres_parent_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the format */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the format */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the format's record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the format's record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artist_albums" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the artist in the album (e.g., lead artist, featured artist) */,
  "contribution_percentage" TEXT /* Percentage of contribution of the artist to the album */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the relationship's record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the relationship's record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id", "album_id")
)
